note: Grammar-faithful SEED inputs for the two zero-tolerance hard blockers (GATE thresholds #4 split-table / #5 broken-REF, coverage #8/#9). These are hand-authored to the EXACT marker grammar used by the OO plugin (plugins/onlyoffice-scribe/scripts/code.js) and scribeResponse.js — clean selection content only (the instruction comes from the action template). They let the gate run TODAY; replace/augment with source:'live' captures exported from the dev panel for the final verdict. The MODEL OUTPUT is what the gate measures — these are only the inputs.
